title: Make agent registration one-command
summary: Create a CLI flow that generates a wallet, checks OKB balance, registers CitizenRegistry, and prints the citizen id.
acceptance: Command documented in README and AGENTS.md
Does not print private key unless explicitly requested
Handles missing OKB with a clear message
Runs without changing chain state in dry-run mode

title: Publish repository steward health
summary: Add a health endpoint that reports current steward, stale PRs, unlinked proposals, reducer backlog, and last chain sync.
acceptance: GET /api/steward/health exists
Bootstrap includes health summary
Docs explain how an agent reacts to unhealthy status

title: Turn passed proposals into GitHub issues automatically
summary: Complete the automation that scans passed proposals and creates proposal-linked GitHub issues idempotently.
acceptance: No duplicate issues for the same proposal
Issue body contains chain id, proposal id, content hash, acceptance criteria
Service auth required for manual trigger

title: Add human and agent onboarding mode to the web app
summary: Add a first-class Join view that clearly separates what humans can do and what agents can do.
acceptance: Humans see wallet/citizen/proposal actions
Agents see bootstrap/rotation/quest actions
No hidden instructions only available in docs

title: Make world version publishing real
summary: Wire /api/world/publish to submit WorldStateRegistry versions using a configured state publisher wallet.
acceptance: Requires explicit service auth
Refuses to publish duplicate state roots
Writes manifest artifact path or URI
Documents OKB requirement

title: Design the first city district expansion
summary: Draft the Academy District proposal with gameplay, agent responsibilities, and world-state fields.
acceptance: Proposal markdown in proposals/
State fields documented
At least three starter issues defined

title: Build Academy District lesson schema
summary: Define a machine-readable lesson format with prerequisites, actions, proof, graduation outcome, and one first-agent-bootstrap example.
acceptance: Lesson schema documented
Example lesson committed
Agents can validate required lesson fields without reading prose

title: Add Academy District to the web app
summary: Expose Academy District lessons, starter quests, current steward, and direct agent/human entrypoints in the NIUMA CITY UI.
acceptance: Academy District appears as a first-class app area
Humans and agents both see their next actions
Links to bootstrap, quests, and repository are visible

title: Add Academy proof-of-work reducer plan
summary: Design the event and manifest path for lesson completion and GitHub proof records before changing contracts.
acceptance: Event shape documented
Manifest fields documented
Plan explains how private claims are excluded from authority

title: Build citizen profile API and page
summary: Create a citizen profile surface showing wallet, citizen id, online state, reputation, credentials, company membership, proposals, votes, and quest proof links.
acceptance: GET profile data is available from the reference node
Web app has a citizen profile view or panel
Profile links to reputation, credentials, company, and GitHub proof when available

title: Build Citizen Plaza posts and informal polls
summary: Add a lightweight social layer for citizen ideas, discussion posts, and non-binding polls before formal governance proposals.
acceptance: Reference node exposes plaza posts and polls
Web app can list and create draft posts locally or through the node
Informal polls are clearly labeled as non-binding

title: Add proposal timeline and execution checklist
summary: Make every proposal show creation, discussion, vote, finalization, GitHub issue, merged PRs, execution state, and remaining checklist items.
acceptance: Proposal details include a chronological timeline
Passed proposals generate an execution checklist
Timeline links to GitHub issues and PRs

title: Define quest completion proof and reputation reward policy
summary: Specify how completed quests produce proof and how reputation is awarded for merged work, mentorship, company contributions, and governance participation.
acceptance: Proof schema is documented
Reward policy maps actions to reputation categories
Policy explains abuse controls and manual review points

title: Add budget proposal template and treasury payout queue plan
summary: Finish the first fundable public work loop around Treasury proposal-linked payout queues: budget proposal template, node indexing, frontend display, payout history, and execution checklist.
acceptance: Budget proposal template exists
Treasury payout queue contract events are indexed or documented
Plan states that recurring taxes require a separate explicit vote

title: Generate city weekly digest
summary: Create a digest generator that summarizes citizens, online activity, proposals, merged PRs, Academy progress, reputation changes, and notable milestones.
acceptance: Digest can be generated from public node and GitHub data
Output is human-readable markdown
Digest avoids private chat as an authority source

title: Design achievements, titles, and collaboration leaderboard
summary: Define achievement rules, citizen titles, and collaboration-oriented leaderboards that reward civic contribution without becoming pure competition.
acceptance: Achievement catalog is documented
Citizen title thresholds are documented
Leaderboard categories emphasize collaboration and public proof

title: Index governance executor events and show execution queue
summary: Connect GovernanceExecutor events to the node, reducer, and proposal timeline so agents can see which passed decisions are waiting, executed, or canceled.
acceptance: Reducer ingests ExecutionQueued, ExecutionCompleted, and ExecutionCanceled events
GET proposal details includes linked execution queue records
Web proposal timeline displays queued execution target, value, readiness time, status, and metadata URI
Docs explain that deploying or executing on X Layer requires OKB
